ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "error": "API endpoint not found", "path": attributes.requestPath, "method": attributes.method }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "accounts": [ { "accountCategory": "DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT", "accountId": "BMO-1234", "nickname": "Everyday Chequing (****1234)", "status": "OPEN", "currency": "CAD", "balanceAsOf": now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}, "currentBalance": 2500.75, "availableBalance": 2450.00 }, { "accountCategory": "DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT", "accountId": "BMO-5678", "nickname": "High Interest Savings (****5678)", "status": "OPEN", "currency": "CAD", "balanceAsOf": now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}, "currentBalance": 15750.20, "availableBalance": 15750.20 }, { "accountCategory": "LOC_ACCOUNT", "accountId": "BMO-9012", "nickname": "BMO Mastercard (****9012)", "status": "OPEN", "currency": "CAD", "balanceAsOf": now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS'Z'"}, "currentBalance": -850.45, "availableBalance": 4149.55 } ], "page": { "total": 3 } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "transactions": [ { "accountCategory": "DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT", "accountId": "BMO-1234", "transactionId": "BMO-TXN-001", "postedTimestamp": "2024-03-24T10:30:00.000Z", "description": "Grocery Store Purchase", "debitCreditMemo": "DEBIT", "amount": 125.67, "payee": "Loblaws" }, { "accountCategory": "DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT", "accountId": "BMO-1234", "transactionId": "BMO-TXN-002", "postedTimestamp": "2024-03-23T14:15:00.000Z", "description": "Salary Deposit — Employer Corp", "debitCreditMemo": "CREDIT", "amount": 3200.00, "payee": "Employer Corp" }, { "accountCategory": "DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT", "accountId": "BMO-5678", "transactionId": "BMO-TXN-003", "postedTimestamp": "2024-03-22T09:45:00.000Z", "description": "Interac e-Transfer to A. Lee", "debitCreditMemo": "DEBIT", "amount": 500.00, "payee": "A. Lee" } ], "page": { "total": 3 } }

logger.doc:name: Log Balance Request
logger.message: Getting balance data with OAuth integration

logger.doc:name: Log Token Available
logger.message: OAuth tokens available, making real API call to bank

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "requestId": uuid(), "timestamp": now() as String, "scopes": ["ACCOUNT_BASIC"] }

logger.doc:name: Log API Call
logger.message: Making authenticated API call to TD Bank with access token (length: #[sizeOf(vars.accessToken)]), session: #[vars.sessionId]

logger.doc:name: Log No Auth
logger.message: No valid OAuth tokens available. Error: #[payload.error default 'unknown'], returning fallback data
